summary: Scramble and decode text effect animation component for Remotion.

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/title-scramble/src/TitleScramble.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `TitleScramble` and `titleScrambleDefaultProps`, then register the `TitleScramble` composition with duration 120, fps 30, width 1920, and height 1080.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Title Scramble Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/title-scramble to my project. Preserve the exported TitleScrambleProps API and register the TitleScramble composition with the default props.
